THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WORTHAM FAMILY PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCLAUGHLIN, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1053 BUSH STREET #10 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAR-31-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT NOW STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 3/31/95.
